case_title: ANGELINA LUCCHESE VS. GUILFREDO JOSE MARTINEZ ET AL

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LUCCHESE, ANGELINA TRUSTEE OF THE ANGELINA LUCCHESE REVOCABLE TRUST RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, GUILFREDO JOSE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 51 ALDER STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94134, COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, ***JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY, AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY (CODE OF CIV. PROC., 715.010, 1169, AND 1174.3)***; SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
